Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Each skill and attack has an {f 0 1 2}affinity{f 0 1 27}, and enemies will have weaknesses towards certain affinities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_000_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 3}Attacking an enemy with its weakness will deal more damage than usual. It will also knock down the enemy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 4}When an enemy is down, you'll be able to attack {f 0 1 2}1 More{f 0 1 27} time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If you use this extra turn to knock down a different enemy, you can attack 1 More time again. As long as you keep knocking the enemies down, you'll be able to attack continuously.[n]{f 1 1}
